# dynamodb-toolkit-express — extended reference

> Express adapter for `dynamodb-toolkit` v3. Mounts the toolkit's standard REST route pack as Express middleware.

**Status:** scaffolding; implementation pending. Full reference will land with the first real release.

## Scope

A thin translation layer between Express's `(req, res, next)` handler shape and `dynamodb-toolkit`'s framework-agnostic pieces:

- `matchRoute(method, path)` from `dynamodb-toolkit/handler` — pure route-shape recognizer.
- Parsers from `dynamodb-toolkit/rest-core` — `parseFields`, `parseSort`, `parseFilter`, `parsePatch`, `parseNames`, `parsePaging`, `parseFlag`.
- Builders + policy from `dynamodb-toolkit/rest-core` — `buildEnvelope`, `buildErrorBody`, `paginationLinks`, `defaultPolicy`, `mapErrorStatus`, `mergePolicy`.
- A dynamodb-toolkit `Adapter` instance supplied by the caller.

## Target API (provisional)

```ts
export interface ExpressAdapterOptions<TItem extends Record<string, unknown> = Record<string, unknown>> {
  policy?: Partial<Policy>;
  sortableIndices?: Record<string, string>;
  keyFromPath?: (rawKey: string, adapter: Adapter<TItem>) => Record<string, unknown>;
  exampleFromContext?: (query: Record<string, string>, body: unknown, req: express.Request) => Record<string, unknown>;
  maxBodyBytes?: number;
}

export function createExpressAdapter<TItem extends Record<string, unknown>>(
  adapter: Adapter<TItem>,
  options?: ExpressAdapterOptions<TItem>
): express.RequestHandler;
```

## Reference

- Parent toolkit: https://github.com/uhop/dynamodb-toolkit
- Sibling adapter (Koa): https://github.com/uhop/dynamodb-toolkit-koa
- Route pack contract: https://github.com/uhop/dynamodb-toolkit/wiki/HTTP-handler
